title: Smoky Arabian Lamb Tagine
description: A classic Arabian dish made with tender lamb, smoky spices, and sweet preserved lemons.
instructions: Heat the oil in the bottom of a tagine over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the lamb and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the spice blend, broth, syrup, and salt.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours.
Add the preserved lemon and simmer for another 10 minutes.
Garnish with parsley and serve hot.
Serve with couscous or rice, if desired.
Let rest for 10 minutes before serving.
Slice and serve with the sauce spooned over the top.
